notes: Extended cases for summing odd values in a binary tree.

cases.name: sample_sum_of_odd_nodes
expect_contains_all: The sum of all odd numbers in the binary tree is: 131.

cases.name: single_odd_node_sum_is_the_node_value
expect_contains_all: The sum of all odd numbers in the binary tree is: 7.

cases.name: all_even_values_sum_to_zero
expect_contains_all: The sum of all odd numbers in the binary tree is: 0.
